result.status_detail: W0e Full 22 regression: submit succeeded, input cleared, but no message bubbles or warning text rendered after 60s+ — identical to #1148

notes: W0e Full 22 regression batch #1165 — notion check-warning. Navigated to https://www.notion.com/chat, hard-reloaded (Ctrl+Shift+R), confirmed logged-in (최장희's Space sidebar). Pasted PII prompt (901010-1234567 RRN) into input editor (id=17 in accessibility tree) via clipboard. DOM Snapshot before submit verified full text loaded in editor value field. Clicked 'AI 메시지 제출하기' submit button (id=22). After submit + 60s+ wait, DOM Snapshot confirmed: input value=(empty) (submit succeeded), submit button id=22 removed (post-submit state), BUT conversation area shows NO user message bubble, NO AI response stream, NO '차단' warning text anywhere. No new interactive elements appeared in conversation area. Identical FAIL_NOT_RENDERED pattern to #1148 post-stash-recovery retest. Confirms W0e Full 22 regression baseline expectation: handler_class=NULL legacy path unchanged for notion — Phase 6 warning render regression persists. Engine intercept fired (no AI reply attempted, input cleared) but warning UI fails to render.
